message.content: 深度分析模块 daemon（路径: parser/daemon/）。识别关键文件、类、函数，理解模块职责和对外接口。返回详细的模块分析。描述: HTTP 和 MCP 服务器

attachment.content:
- coredump: Analyze an Android coredump file. Print a Java class and its members, or drill into any field by address.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
- superpowers:receiving-code-review
- superpowers:requesting-code-review

- superpowers:using-git-worktrees
- superpowers:using-superpowers
- superpowers:verification-before-completion
- superpowers:writing-plans
- superpowers:writing-skills

- understand-anything:understand-chat

- understand-anything:understand-diff
- understand-anything:understand-domain
- understand-anything:understand-explain
- understand-anything:understand-knowledge
- understand-anything:understand-onboard
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

input.module_name: daemon (HTTP 和 MCP 服务器)
input.purpose: 为 core-parser 提供远程访问能力，支持通过 HTTP REST API 和 MCP (Model Context Protocol) stdio 协议执行命令，实现 Web UI 交互和 AI 助手集成

key_classes.name: HttpServer
key_classes.purpose: HTTP REST API 服务器，提供 Web UI 和远程命令执行

key_classes.name: McpServer
key_classes.purpose: MCP stdio 服务器，实现 JSON-RPC 2.0 协议用于 AI 助手集成

key_classes.name: JsonEscape
key_classes.purpose: 将字符串转义为 JSON 格式（两个模块共用实现）

key_classes.name: JsonUnescape
key_classes.purpose: MCP 模块反转义 JSON 字符串

key_classes.name: JsonGetString
key_classes.purpose: MCP 模块解析 JSON 字段值

key_classes.name: JsonGetId
key_classes.purpose: MCP 模块提取 JSON-RPC 请求 ID

key_classes.name: HttpGet
key_classes.purpose: MCP 模块的 HTTP 客户端，用于 run_remote_command 工具

key_classes.name: RunCommand
key_classes.purpose: 执行 core-parser 命令并捕获输出（两个模块不同实现）

responsibilities: HTTP 服务器：通过 cpp-httplib 库启动 HTTP 服务，监听指定 IP:PORT（默认 127.0.0.1:1104）
HTTP 路由：提供 GET / 返回嵌入式 Web UI（index.html），GET /core-parser?cmd=<command> 执行命令
命令执行与输出捕获：通过 WorkThread 执行命令，使用 Utils::FreopenWrite 重定向 stdout 到临时文件，执行完成后读取并返回
守护进程化：HTTP 服务器调用 daemon(1,1) 后台运行
MCP 协议实现：实现 JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio，支持 initialize、tools/list、tools/call、ping 方法
MCP 工具注册：提供 run_command（本地执行）和 run_remote_command（远程 HTTP 调用）两个工具
JSON 处理：手写 JSON 解析和生成函数，避免依赖第三方库（最小化二进制体积）
跨平台支持：HTTP 服务仅支持 64 位平台（通过 __HTTPLIB__ 宏控制），MCP 支持 Linux/macOS/Windows
Web UI 提供：单页应用提供命令输入框、输出展示、命令历史、自动刷新当前加载的 core 文件路径
远程命令支持：MCP 的 run_remote_command 工具实现 HTTP 客户端，可连接到远程 core-parser HTTP 服务器（如通过 adb forward 连接 Android 设备）
dependencies: 标准库：<string>, <fstream>, <iostream>, <regex>（HTTP 模块），<sys/socket>, <netdb>（MCP HTTP 客户端）
构建系统：CMake EmbedFile.cmake 脚本将 index.html 嵌入为 C 数组（IndexHtml, IndexHtmlSize）

endpoints.description: 执行命令并返回 JSON: {"result": "<output>"}，支持 CORS

methods.name: initialize
methods.description: 初始化握手，返回协议版本 2024-11-05 和能力声明

methods.name: notifications/initialized
methods.description: 客户端通知初始化完成（无响应）

methods.name: tools/list
methods.description: 列出可用工具：run_command 和 run_remote_command

methods.name: tools/call
methods.description: 调用工具，参数 {name, arguments}，返回 {content: [{type: text, text: <output>}]}

tools.name: run_command

parameters.command: 要执行的 core-parser 命令

tools.description: 在本地已加载的 core 上执行命令，状态会话持久化（加载 core、设置 sysroot 等配置会保留）

tools.name: run_remote_command

parameters.url: 远程服务器 URL（如 http://127.0.0.1:8080，首次必需，后续会缓存）

tools.description: 向远程 HTTP daemon 发送命令，用于 Android 设备等场景

flags.description: 启动 HTTP 服务器，默认 127.0.0.1:1104
启动 MCP stdio 服务器

functions.description: 启动 HTTP 服务器，解析 IP:PORT，校验格式和范围，调用 daemon() 后台运行
阻塞式运行 MCP 事件循环，从 stdin 读取 JSON-RPC 请求，通过 dup 的 stdout_fd 写响应

content.text:
我已完成对 `parser/daemon/` 模块的深度分析。该模块提供了两套远程访问机制：

## 核心架构

该模块分为两个子模块：
- **http/** - 基于 cpp-httplib 的 REST API 服务器，提供 Web UI 和 HTTP 接口
- **mcp/** - 实现 MCP (Model Context Protocol) JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio 协议，用于 AI 助手集成

## 关键特性

**HTTP 服务器**：
- 默认监听 127.0.0.1:1104，支持自定义 IP:PORT
- 提供嵌入式单页 Web UI（index.html 通过 CMake 构建时转换为 C 数组）
- 执行命令时通过 `Utils::FreopenWrite` 重定向 stdout 到临时文件，完成后读取并返回 JSON

**MCP 服务器**：
- 实现完整的 JSON-RPC 2.0 协议（initialize、tools/list、tools/call、ping）
- 注册两个工具：`run_command`（本地执行）和 `run_remote_command`（HTTP 客户端，可连接到远程 core-parser）
- 手写 JSON 解析器避免引入第三方依赖，最小化二进制体积
- 跨平台支持（Linux/macOS/Windows），通过条件编译处理 socket API 差异

**共同机制**：
- 两者都使用 `WorkThread` 执行命令并捕获输出
- HTTP 模式调用 `daemon()` 后台化，MCP 模式阻塞式运行事件循环
- 通过 Logger::SetHighLight(false) 禁用 ANSI 颜色码，确保输出可嵌入 JSON

该模块是 core-parser 从命令行工具扩展为服务的关键基础设施，支持 Web 交互和 AI 工具调用两种现代化使用场景。
